task_desc: Fix food items becoming unreachable after window resize causing infinite feed-startle loop, and clean up remaining visibilitychange state gaps -- (1) food positions not re-clamped after resize: the resize handler at main.js:1518-1526 updates canvas dimensions but never adjusts food array positions; when the window shrinks (desktop resize or mobile orientation change), food items near the old edges end up past the new boundary; the fly is position-clamped at [0, innerWidth] x [44, innerHeight-90] (main.js:1404-1421) but the food proximity check at main.js:1426-1460 uses a 50px radius, so food 0-50px past the new edge is still detected; food 21-50px past the edge is worst: hasNearbyFood() returns true (dist <= 50), evaluateBehaviorEntry enters feed state, computeMovementForBehavior sets targetSpeed=0.15 and targetDir toward the food (main.js:628-632), the fly drifts into the wall at 0.15px/frame, the wall-collision clamp at main.js:1408 fires every frame setting BRAIN.stimulate.touch=true and extending touchResetTime, each 500ms brain tick then adds fear(+0.3) and groom(+0.2), but the food is never consumed because dist > 20px prevents the gradual feeding block at main.js:1430-1444 from executing; after a few ticks fear triggers startle, the fly jumps away, then hunger draws it back to the unreachable food, creating an infinite oscillation; same issue on the Y axis when innerHeight decreases pushing food below newInnerHeight-90; fix by clamping all food positions to current bounds in the resize handler or by skipping out-of-bounds food in the proximity loop, (2) the visibilitychange resume handler at main.js:252-299 resets stimuli, drives, behavior state, speed, drag state, and food timestamps but does not clear behavior.cooldowns; stale cooldowns from the pre-hide state persist and block re-entering recently-active states after resume (groom blocked up to 3s, startle 2s, fly 1s, feed 1s) even though all triggering stimuli were cleared and drives were restored; fix by adding behavior.cooldowns = {} in the resume branch after the behavior state reset at main.js:293, (3) dead targetPair variable at drawLegs main.js:1275 assigned but never read (noted in D4.2 build claims as a gap); remove it. Files: js/main.js.
